npm is a runtime installer only.

requiredEvidence: platform package generated from archive contents
lanes.notes: Windows x64 and Linux x64 GNU are the current npm platform package set. macOS npm packages are deferred until Mac-built artifact and registry install smoke evidence exist. Platform packages must not independently build Sloppy.

requiredEvidence: V8 SDK build or resolved hosted SDK

Live providers are opt-in and not default package evidence.
